description: Lands Awakened Patch 7 (30 March 2022) — Controller Support Improvements, Attack- and Defend-Ping Hotkeys, Guild Logo Changes, Mob Changes, Duel Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Controller Support Improvements

items.text: Added Controller options to Settings menu
Holding the right shoulder button now triggers target selection via the right stick
Pressing the right stick now opens a radial context menu in-game, enabling different actions based on selected target
Added an alternate control scheme, allowing selection of targets via right stick instead of using a cursor
Added an alternate spell control scheme, "Cast on button release", which uses left stick targeting
Various additional controller behavior improvements

sections.searchable_text: Controller Support Improvements Added Controller options to Settings menu Holding the right shoulder button now triggers target selection via the right stick Pressing the right stick now opens a radial context menu in-game, enabling different actions based on selected target Added an alternate control scheme, allowing selection of targets via right stick instead of using a cursor Added an alternate spell control scheme, "Cast on button release", which uses left stick targeting Various additional controller behavior improvements

sections.heading: Attack- and Defend-Ping Hotkeys

items.text: Attack: Ctrl-P
Defend: Shift-P

sections.searchable_text: Attack- and Defend-Ping Hotkeys Attack: Ctrl-P Defend: Shift-P

sections.heading: Guild Logo Changes

items.text: The logo "Hammer and Sickle" has been replaced with the new logo "Hammer"
The logo "Red Army" has been replaced with the new logo "Bear"
Guilds affected by this who do not like the new logos can contact support to request a one-time change to a new logo
The two guilds who created the now-removed logos will be able to submit a new custom logo design to us as a replacement

sections.searchable_text: Guild Logo Changes The logo "Hammer and Sickle" has been replaced with the new logo "Hammer" The logo "Red Army" has been replaced with the new logo "Bear" Guilds affected by this who do not like the new logos can contact support to request a one-time change to a new logo The two guilds who created the now-removed logos will be able to submit a new custom logo design to us as a replacement

sections.heading: Mob Changes

items.text: The Keeper Pack Leader and Axe Maiden found in the Open World got tired from throwing so many axes and now use their Axe Assault spell less frequently

subitems.text: Axe Assault (Keeper Pack Leader and Axe Maiden)
Spell is only cast if player health is above 50%

items.text: Earthkeeper Shaman

subitems.text: Now displays a red arrow when a player is a valid target for melee attack

sections.searchable_text: Mob Changes The Keeper Pack Leader and Axe Maiden found in the Open World got tired from throwing so many axes and now use their Axe Assault spell less frequently Axe Assault (Keeper Pack Leader and Axe Maiden) Earthkeeper Shaman Now displays a red arrow when a player is a valid target for melee attack

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: When a secondary bank or inventory tab is open, shift-clicking an item will send it there rather than to inventory
Chat window is now locked by default

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes When a secondary bank or inventory tab is open, shift-clicking an item will send it there rather than to inventory Chat window is now locked by default

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed an issue where Corrupted Dungeons could not be entered while under the Portal Invisibility Shrine buff
Fixed an issue where Silver auto-pickup did not work after an in-game reconnect
Fixed missing checkpoints in Eternal Battle expedition
Festive Reindeer Stag Skin now correctly displays as tradeable
Gathering and Fishing Speed Bonuses on Destiny Board now include percent signs
Mystic Rocks now makes caster immune to Cleanse Heal (in line with overall healing immunity)
Spell description for Rejuvenating Sprint now displays correct duration
Fixed an issue where clicking a chest after its opening channel was complete would restart the channel
[MOBILE, CONTROLLER] Fixed issue where target marker arrow would stay on a mob target if the next target was a player
Various additional graphical, UI, and localization fixes
